misc: Has a habit of getting lost on golf course grounds
Does not spit in the glass
biography: Janne, representing Revontuli Golf, is a familiar and cherished figure within the competitive tapestry of the Hector Trophée, having participated in eight previous editions of this unique pair competition. His consistent involvement over the years underscores a deep-seated appreciation for the event's demanding formats and the camaraderie it fosters among competitors.

Across his eight ventures onto the demanding fairways, Janne has demonstrated a persistent effort, yet he continues his determined pursuit of a maiden triumph. Neither the coveted Hector Trophée team title nor the prestigious individual Victor Trophy has, thus far, graced his collection. Janne embodies a distinctive combination of competitive spirit and a notably generous nature, qualities that consistently resonate with fellow participants and observers alike.

Janne's presence on the course is further distinguished by a charming, if sometimes perplexing, tendency to become disoriented amidst the sprawling layouts—a habit playfully noted by his companions, who occasionally find themselves guiding him back to the intended path. Despite these occasional navigational challenges, he maintains a principled approach to the game and to life; indeed, he is renowned for a steadfast adherence to proper etiquette, firmly believing one "does not spit in the glass."

Though Janne retains an active status within the broader Hector events, he will not be joining the competitive field for the Hector Trophée 2026. His absence will undoubtedly be noted, as his unique blend of sportsmanship, good humor, and persistent dedication has consistently enriched the tournament's distinctive atmosphere, leaving anticipation for his potential return in future editions, where his quest for competitive success will undoubtedly resume.
